name: Disney+
reliabilityNotes: Disney+ blocks many known VPN IP ranges but is generally more permissive than Netflix. Regional libraries vary and some VPNs work reliably.
troubleshootingTips: Connect to a server in the target region before opening Disney+
Clear browser cache or use incognito/private mode
Try different server locations within the same region
Disable IPv6 in your system network settings if issues persist
